title: limniris bracteata
intro: Limniris bracteata, also known as the Siberian iris, is a plant species that belongs to the Iridaceae family. The medicinal properties of Limniris bracteata include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Limniris bracteata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
